summary: Batch 09 was completed by retaining the prior legal correction to B09-Q019 and replacing the five duplicate-angle items with fresh supported angles. The batch is now approval-ready as a complete content file.

corrections.resolution: Kept the corrected immediate-for-cause appointment-termination filing rule under Texas Insurance Code §4001.206.
Replaced spendthrift-clause angle with facility-of-payment scenario.
Replaced alien-insurer classification angle with unauthorized-insurer angle.
Replaced automatic-premium-loan angle with interest-only settlement option angle.
Replaced POS plan angle with Exclusive Provider Organization angle.
Replaced simultaneous-death angle with per-stirpes beneficiary-distribution angle.

schema_check.notes: Completed file is valid JSON and retains the approved schema.

next_step: Batch 09 is ready to keep in the approved-content pile.
